_comment: Thunder Celestial Realm (雷仙界) — the pocket realm of the Thunder Celestial Temple. Canon (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L53/L54; CANON_RI_TIMELINE.md E24, E94): Site of Wang Lin's Thunder Celestial Tournament victory; he kills Russell here, becomes the Thunder Celestial of the Thunder Celestial Temple, and the Blood Ancestor is slain here (E94). Wang Lin obtains the God-Slaying War Chariot, the Celestial Emperor Crown, and Bai Fan's Collection Pavilion inheritance. The realm is a perpetual thunder-storm dimension — crackling clouds, lightning lakes, thunder-saturated air, and Thunder Lake trial grounds surround the Temple. Non-thunder cultivators are damaged by merely being present. Prime Directive: the perpetual storm and thunder-saturation are objective properties of the realm — they exist because the realm is the thunder-aspect source-dimension anchored by the Thunder Celestial Temple, not because anyone perceives them. Post-ch.901 (referenced by ch.901 karmic completion).
